subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant! Send forth the enclosed letters, and unto the mothers of the believers, the luminous leaf, handmaid of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده میثاق مکاتیب جوف را ارسال نمااید و بام المومنین ورقه نوراء امة الله
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
